creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
made my list of gstreamer1 plugins and wiped them as per UPDATING. during rebuild get this error when trying to re-install this one
think its a similar issue to PR 267132 as I have multimedia/v4l_compat installed, but not devel/libgusb

13.1p2 amd64

Run-time dependency gudev-1.0 found: YES 234
Has header "linux/videodev2.h" : YES 
Header "sys/mkdev.h" has symbol "makedev" : NO 
Header "sys/sysmacros.h" has symbol "makedev" : NO 
Header "sys/types.h" has symbol "makedev" : YES 

sys/v4l2codecs/meson.build:38:2: ERROR: Unknown variable "gstcodecs_dep".

A full log can be found at /usr/ports/audio/gstreamer1-plugins-chromaprint/work/gst-plugins-bad-1.20.3/_build/meson-logs/meson-log.txt
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to multimedia@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach
the
"/usr/ports/audio/gstreamer1-plugins-chromaprint/work/gst-plugins-bad-1.20.3/_build/meson-logs/meson-log.txt"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be
a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system
(e.g. a /usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1
